thesis.statement: Aggregate stablecoin supply is flat-to-contracting while capital concentrates into BTC at the expense of ETH and alts. The current window is a defensive rotation regime: overweight BTC, underweight ETH and alt beta, until either stablecoin supply re-expands (fresh liquidity) or ETH/BTC bases and turns up (rotation back out the risk curve).
thesis.implication_for_routing: Bias Task Node allocation toward BTC-correlated exposure; discount alt-beta theses lacking an idiosyncratic catalyst until liquidity or ETH/BTC confirms a regime change.

evidence.observation: Aggregate stablecoin market capitalization (CoinGecko Stablecoins category).
evidence.interpretation: Total on-chain dry powder; level is the denominator for buying power.

evidence.observation: USDT+USDC combined market cap moved -2,565,420,927 USD over the window.
evidence.interpretation: Proxy for net stablecoin flow; negative reading indicates net redemption / no fresh liquidity. Proxy, not on-chain mint/burn or exchange netflow data.

evidence.observation: BTC share of total crypto market cap.
evidence.interpretation: Elevated dominance signals defensive concentration into BTC within crypto.

evidence.observation: ETH priced in BTC; ratio changed -7.30% over 30d.
evidence.interpretation: Falling ETH/BTC is the core rotation tell: capital leaving the risk curve for BTC.
ETH materially underperforming BTC corroborates the defensive rotation.

evidence.observation: Total market cap excluding BTC and ETH (derived: total - BTC - ETH).
evidence.interpretation: Alt aggregate; context size for alt-beta exposure being de-emphasized.

conditions.rationale: Stablecoin supply re-expanding by >=2% signals fresh liquidity; the no-fuel premise no longer holds.
ETH/BTC reclaiming the window-open level reverses the rotation tell; risk curve turning back up.
BTC dominance breaking below 55% indicates capital rotating out to alts; defensive thesis weakens.

confidence.rationale: Market-structure reads (caps, dominance, ratios) are direct live aggregated data at HIGH confidence. The net-flow read rests on a USDT+USDC supply proxy rather than on-chain mint/burn or exchange netflow data, and 30-day macro regime calls carry inherent timing uncertainty, so the composite is held at MEDIUM.

sources.name: CoinGecko ETH/BTC (simple price + 30d chart in BTC)

proxy_substitutions.reason: on-chain mint/burn and exchange netflow feeds not reachable in build environment
